database_schema.summary: Project uses Cloudflare D1 (SQLite) as main database.

tables.name: quizzes
tables.description: Stores quiz metadata. Columns: id, title, class_level, category, tags, time_limit, create_at, access_code, require_code, created_by, show_on_home.

tables.name: questions
tables.description: Stores questions linked to quizzes. Columns: id, quiz_id, type, question, options, correct_answer, items, text_field, blanks, distractors, sentence, words, correct_word_indexes, image.

tables.name: results
tables.description: Stores student submission results with answers.

tables.name: classes
tables.description: Stores class information and teacher assignment.

tables.name: students
tables.description: Stores student accounts with coins and class mapping.

tables.name: assignments
tables.description: Stores quiz assignments with deadlines and max attempts.

features: AI Tutor - Giải thích đáp án sai
Subject Categories (Toán, Tiếng Việt, Tiếng Anh, TN&XH, Tin học, IOE)
Tagging System - Quản lý kho đề theo nhãn đa phương thức
Difficulty Levels (Mức 1/2/3) support in Questions & Word Export
Smart Distractors - AI-generated wrong answers for MCQ/MULTIPLE_SELECT
Auto-Assign Quizzes to Class upon Creation
Simplified Result UI with Navigation Button

patterns.name: ExplanationContent Pattern
patterns.description: Component riêng để render AI explanation với Markdown + LaTeX support

patterns.name: MathSpan Pattern
patterns.description: Component để render LaTeX math formulas using MathJax

patterns.name: Zustand-API Mapping
patterns.description: Logic deserialization data từ D1 API: map các field snake_case (text_field, correct_answer) về camelCase component-friendly (text, correctAnswer)

patterns.name: resolveCorrectWordIndexes Fallback
patterns.description: 4-level fallback to resolve correctWordIndexes for UNDERLINE: quiz object → correctAnswer parse → snapshot → validationDetails

gotchas.issue_vi: Cột D1 SQLite dùng text_field (do trùng keyword text), nhưng FE component dùng field 'text'
gotchas.solution: Luôn gán parsed.text = parsed.text_field trong logic loadQuizzes của store.

gotchas.issue_vi: Hàm onAnswerChange cho Dropdown yêu cầu object Record thay vì value đơn lẻ
gotchas.solution: Sử dụng { ...currentAnswers, [blank.id]: e.target.value } khi gọi callback.
Use dangerouslySetInnerHTML to render HTML content.

conventions: Dùng callApi helper trong services/apiAdapter.ts cho các request tới Cloudflare Worker.
Question types have different correct answer fields: correctAnswer, correctAnswers, items, pairs, blanks
Tất cả quiz mới phải được gán Subject Category tương ứng để phân loại trên Dashboard.
